summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Pet Life OS fixes: duplicate Mira orb removal, strict breed filtering, Request Collection CTA, MiraPureOSPage pillar picks (go/play/shop/emergency/farewell/paperwork), Dine pill pet switcher, watercolor service images. All 7 features verified PASSING via Playwright tests.

integration_issues.flow: Pets API fetch in Playwright browser
integration_issues.issue: fetch() for /api/pets/my-pets fails with 'TypeError: Failed to fetch' in Playwright due to emergent.sh script overriding window.fetch. NOT a production bug — real browser works fine.

duplicate_mira_orb_removal.details: MiraAI.jsx hiddenPaths includes /pet-home, /dashboard, /my-pets, /my-requests. Verified: no [data-testid='mira-orb-container'] found on any of these pages. MiraAI returns null on these paths.

single_mira_on_pillar_pages.details: /dine, /care, /shop all show no MiraAI orb. MiraChatWidget 'Ask Mira' button visible as the single Mira entry point on pillar pages (via MiraChatWidget embedded in pillar). isOnPillarPage check in MiraAI.jsx correctly returns null on pillar paths.

breed_filtering_strict_mode.details: Lola (Maltese) selected on /shop mobile. Breed tab shows 'Maltese Collection' with Maltese-only products. No Akita products visible anywhere. filterBreedProducts() correctly excludes cross-breed products. BreedCollectionSection uses breed-specific API endpoint. MiraPicksSection uses filterBreedProducts() at line 62 of ShopMobilePage.jsx.

request_collection_cta.details: data-testid='request-breed-collection-btn' found in PersonalisedBreedSection empty state. Button text: 'Request Maltese Collection →'. PersonalisedBreedSection empty state shown because breed-catalogue API returns no products with 'breed-' prefix images for Maltese. Button is in the 'For Lola' (for_pet) tab, not the 'Breed' tab.

mira_pure_os_pillar_tabs.details: All 6 new pillar tabs verified at /mira-pure-os: Go (Pet-Friendly Hotels, Travel Kit, Pet Taxi), Play (Dog Park Visit, Pet Cafe Booking), Shop (Breed Collection, Hamper Gift Box), Emergency (Emergency Vet, First Aid Guide, Emergency Kit), Farewell (Rainbow Bridge Memorial, Memorial Canvas Print, Pawprint Keepsake), Paperwork (Pet Passport, Vaccination Certificate, Microchip Registration). Old pillar names (travel/stay/enjoy/fit) NOT found in page content. The fix is at /mira-pure-os route (MiraPureOSPage.jsx), NOT /mira (MiraPage.jsx).

dine_pill_pet_switcher.details: On /dine at 390px viewport, pill buttons confirmed for all 8 pets: Mojo, Mystique, Bruno, Buddy, Lola, Meister, Luna, Coco. No native <select> element found. Pill buttons use button elements with inline styles for active state.

watercolor_service_images.details: Clicked 'Pamper & Groom' category on /services. 17 images loaded with 0 broken. Cloudinary URL confirmed: res.cloudinary.com/duoapcx1p/image/upload/v1773334107/doggy/services/care/svc-care-prescription-diet.png. Watercolor illustrations visible in service cards (not blank fallback icons).

critical_code_review_comments: PersonalisedBreedSection.jsx lines 226-227: Uses 'effectiveHidePrice' variable which is NEVER DEFINED in the component. Prop is 'hidePrice'. This would throw a ReferenceError if products ever render. Currently safe only because breed-catalogue API returns no products passing the 'breed-' prefix image filter (empty state always shown). FIX NEEDED: Replace 'effectiveHidePrice' with 'hidePrice' at lines 226-227.

MiraPage.jsx (/mira route): QUICK_ACTIONS still uses old pillar names 'travel' and 'stay' (lines 39-45). The fix for pillar names (travel→go, enjoy→play) was applied only to MiraPureOSPage.jsx at /mira-pure-os. The /mira route remains with old names. This is separate from the test scope but worth noting.

ShopMobilePage.jsx structure: PersonalisedBreedSection (from breed-catalogue API) is in the 'for_pet' tab, while the 'breed' tab uses BreedCollectionSection (from admin/breed-products API). Both correctly show Maltese-specific products for Lola. filterBreedProducts() is applied to MiraPicksSection picks at line 62.
action_items: Fix PersonalisedBreedSection.jsx line 226-227: Replace 'effectiveHidePrice' with 'hidePrice' (prop is named hidePrice). This is a latent ReferenceError bug - not currently triggered but will crash if breed-catalogue API ever returns products with 'breed-' prefixed image URLs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 features in this batch passed. Key architecture notes: (1) MiraPureOSPage is at /mira-pure-os NOT /mira. (2) PersonalisedBreedSection (from breed-catalogue/products API) is in ShopMobilePage's 'for_pet' tab, while BreedCollectionSection (from admin/breed-products API) is in the 'breed' tab. (3) Pets API fetch fails in Playwright due to emergent.sh script override - not a prod issue. (4) effectiveHidePrice bug in PersonalisedBreedSection.jsx is latent - doesn't crash currently because no breed-catalogue products pass the breed- image prefix filter.
rca_of_issues: effectiveHidePrice: The variable was likely renamed from 'effectiveHidePrice' to 'hidePrice' (the prop) at some point but the usage at lines 226-227 was not updated. Since the component always hits the empty state for breed-catalogue products (no products with breed- prefix images), the bug is dormant.
